productDisplayName: Red Tape Men's Slip On Brown Formal Shoe
description: These beautiful brown leather shoes from red tape with the textured leather, tapered toe box and cutting edge look complement all casual and semi casual wear. The design creates a perfect foundation for building a well groomed look that exudes style and confidence.Upper Pure leather upper for maximum durability and comfort Micro embossed leather upper for style Slip-on technique for comfortable use Midsole Phylon midsole for lightweight comfort Soft and cushioned insole for all day comfort Outsole Heel with herringbone grip pattern for traction and support Textured below forefoot region for grip on rough terrain shoe careUse a branded shoe polish to keep your leather footwear clean and shiny
